reviews.review_description: Dear developers, this game is a pretty fun game to play, but a few things I would like to see happen to the game is that you add more options on the computer, and fix the player model and hands. And have a live player count thingy on the computer screen at all times that you can make it show the live player count, and please make a shop area or update your shop so it has cosmetics and make a currency system so you can see how many of whatever the currency you have. Solid game, fun game to play with friends. 4.5/5

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! I'm adding all this to my next game so stay tuned! Its name will be Lo's Paradise.

reviews.review_description: Dumb dumb dumb I want to die now

developer_response.body: I'm sorry you feel this way, please give more detail and feedback if you want to: lo.cpp on discord.

Hi, sorry that you're feeling this way, I am working on a new game called Lo's Paradise, if you want to suggest ideas on how to help it, I would appreciate it, contact me on discord to suggest ideas: lo.cpp

reviews.review_description: Can’t wait for the full version to drop!!

developer_response.body: Hey sorry, we are just celebrating pride month!
